exam_price_notes: ₹2,250 (~$27 USD) per module exam fee (2 modules: Module I — 3 papers, Module II — 3 papers)

testing_centers.provider: ICSI Regional Exam Centres and CBT Centres

id_requirements: ICSI Student Registration Number + valid government photo ID (Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence)
exam_rules: Pen-and-paper examination OR CBT (Computer Based Test) for Foundation. Descriptive answers required for Executive and Professional. No negative marking.
renewal_options: CS membership is for lifetime; practising members require Certificate of Practice with annual renewal and CPD compliance

prerequisites.description: CS Executive (both modules) cleared; enrolled in Professional Programme with ICSI

retake_policy.notes: Exams held in June and December; no limit on attempts; exemption in any paper scored ≥60% is valid for next 3 sittings

domains.name: Paper 1: Advanced Company Law and Practice (Meetings, Resolutions, NCLT, Cross-Border)
Paper 2: Secretarial Audit, Compliance Management and Due Diligence
Paper 3: Corporate Restructuring, Insolvency, Liquidation and Winding-Up
Paper 4: Economic, Business and Commercial Laws (Competition Act, IPR, Consumer Protection)
Paper 5: Governance, Risk Management, Compliances and Ethics
Paper 6: Drafting, Pleadings and Appearances (Legal Drafting, Court Practice, ADR)
